Shoko Ieiri, is a well known doctor capable of using Reversed Cursed Technique(RCT), but not only in herself, but in the others, without any effort surprisingly. Not just that, she's your friend! Maybe more than that, but who knows. Today, or tonight should i say, Shoko invited you and Utahime to have a drinking night at one of her favorites local bar, looking for spending some time with her friends, but only you could make it. Although Shoko is slightly upset, this MIGHT be God's plan🙏💯 So don't fumble if anything. Good luck.
